person.name: Jou-Tsen Ou（歐柔岑）
person.field: 化學（超分子化學、稀土分離、高分子材料）

bio.era: 台灣：超分子化學的起點（–2021）
bio.text: 於台灣大學與陽明交通大學（交大）求學，交大期間加入王建隆（Chien-Lung Wang）實驗室，投入超分子化學與高分子材料研究。2017–2022 年間參與多篇論文，並以第一作者在 Macromolecules 發表 Q-clip 主客體系統的組成驅動結構調變研究。
bio.note: 學位與年份待家人補充

bio.era: 美國馬里蘭：稀土分離（約 2021–2025）
bio.text: 進入 University of Maryland, College Park 化學博士班，加入 Mercedes Taylor 實驗室，研究方向為自組裝驅動之稀土分離——以 M4L4 金屬有機籠與聚醯胺離子聚合物網絡分離鑭系元素。2025 年 10 月 17 日完成博士論文口試「Self-Assembly Drives Rare Earth Separation: M4L4 Cages and Polyamide Ionomer Networks」。
bio.note: 入學年份為推估，待確認

bio.text: 赴日本擔任博士後研究員，延續材料化學研究。
bio.note: 機構與實驗室名稱待補充（公開資料尚查無）

themes.title: 超分子化學與主客體組裝
themes.summary: 從 DPP 寡聚物的結晶工程出發，發展 POSS 基「單分子四重夾（Q-clip）」主客體系統：適應性組裝、組成比例驅動的結構調變、客體誘導奈米模板；並以八臂星形巨型分子連結分子與超分子兩個層級的變形（shapeshifting）行為。
applications: 有機半導體與場效電晶體（OFET）
奈米模板與中空超分子骨架

themes.title: 自組裝驅動的稀土分離
themes.period: 約 2021–2025｜UMD Mercedes Taylor 實驗室（博士論文主軸）
themes.summary: 以稀土金屬與三牙配體自組裝 M4L4 金屬有機籠，利用鑭系離子尺寸差異達成選擇性結合與分離；進一步把可聚合（烯烴端基）籠經 thiol-ene 交聯為稀土結合高分子網絡，並以單晶繞射、EXAFS 與 DFT 建立配體設計原則。
applications: 關鍵材料供應鏈（永磁體、螢光體、電動車馬達）
可聚合金屬有機籠材料

themes.title: 功能高分子與離子聚合物
themes.summary: 羰基富集多孔有機聚合物（POP）之水中鈷吸附——藉端基比例調控最大化吸附容量；以及聚醯胺離子聚合物的結構—溶解度—結晶性關係，為博士論文的第二主軸。
applications: 水中重金屬吸附與關鍵金屬回收

records.title: 台灣求學階段：台灣大學、陽明交通大學（交大）
records.detail: 曾就讀台大與交大（學位與年份待家人補充）。交大期間於王建隆（Chien-Lung Wang）實驗室從事超分子化學研究，2017–2022 年間共同發表多篇論文。

records.title: Roles of 3-Ethylrhodanine in Attaining Highly Ordered Crystal Arrays of Ambipolar Diketopyrrolopyrrole Oligomers
records.detail: 共同作者（第 6 作者）。DPP 寡聚物端基工程與結晶陣列研究。
records.abstract: Until now, only limited DPP oligomers delivered ambipolar semiconductor characteristics. To develop a facile strategy of preparing ambipolar mono-DPP oligomers, two dithienyl diketopyrrolopyrrole (DPPT) based-conjugated molecules, DPPT-RD and DPPT-DCV, which contain 3-ethylrhodanine (RD) and dicyano-2-vinyl (DCV) end substituents were synthesized. The influences of the -RD end substituents on the molecular properties, solid-state morphology, and OFET performances of the DPPT oligomer were investigated. The UV-vis absorption and CV results showed that the RD end substituents provide the DPPT oligomer suitable EHOMO and ELUMO for hole and electron injection from the Au source-drain electrodes. Moreover, the RD end substituents also improve the crystalline nature of the DPPT oligomer. That is, DPPT-RD can form crystal arrays with good lattice orientation, larger crystalline size, and without polymorphism. With those properties, DPPT-RD thus display ambipolar characteristic with μh and μe reaching 2.16 × 10⁻² and 7.27 × 10⁻² cm² V⁻¹ s⁻¹, respectively.
records.contribution: 參與 DPP 寡聚物的固態形貌與結晶分析（共同作者），為進入超分子組裝研究前的結晶工程訓練。
records.significance: 示範以 3-ethylrhodanine 端基同時調整能階與結晶秩序，讓單一 DPP 寡聚物達成雙極性（電子＋電洞）傳輸——對有機場效電晶體（OFET）材料設計有直接應用價值。

records.title: Adaptive molecular quaternary clips made with pyrene functionalized polyhedral oligomeric silsesquioxane
records.detail: 第二作者。POSS 基適應性單分子四重夾（Q-clip）之主客體組裝。
records.abstract: Evolving synthetic molecules toward complex structures is a major goal in supramolecular chemistry. Increasing the number of clips in a unimolecular multi-clip (UMC), although vital to elevate the complexity of supramolecular architectures, often prevents the UMC from forming host–guest complexes in the bulk phase. To overcome this difficulty, adaptive chemistry was applied to develop a novel adaptive unimolecular quaternary clip (Q-clip). The Q-clip is intrinsically amorphous, but self-organizes with exclusively 4 eq. of allosteric activators (NDI) to form the Q-clip:NDI₄ complexes and a supramolecular lamellar structure in the bulk. The adaptive assembly is fast and allows us to locate the adaptive assembly area of Q-clip:NDI₄ complexes in the amorphous Q-clip film. Our results provide new insights into the design of adaptive UMCs for the evolution toward complex structures and supramolecular functional materials.
records.contribution: 第二作者，參與 Q-clip 的合成與 bulk 相主客體複合體結構鑑定。
records.significance: 解決「單分子多重夾在 bulk 相難以形成主客體複合體」的瓶頸——以適應性化學讓非晶 Q-clip 遇 NDI 活化劑即自組織成層狀超分子結構，為超分子功能材料開新路。

records.title: Composition-Driven Structural Modulation and Guest-Induced Nanotemplate Effects of the Host–Guest Complexes Made by a Unimolecular Q-Clip
records.detail: 第一作者。以主客體莫耳比調變超分子結構，並以昇華客體實現奈米模板。
records.abstract: The composition of a self-assembly system has long been an essential factor that governs the resulting supramolecular structures. Nevertheless, due to the rigorous demands of structural compatibility in host–guest chemistry, the molar ratio of host–guest mixtures has not been applied as a significant factor in modulating the supramolecular structures of host–guest complexes. In this study, via using a novel unimolecular quaternary clip (Q-clip) as the host molecule and pyrene as the guest molecule and a nanotemplating reagent, we discovered that the changes in the molar ratios of the Q-clip:pyrene mixtures resulted in the structural modulation of the host–guest complexes. Supramolecular lamellae made by the 1:4 Q-clip:pyrene mixture and a hexagonal columnar phase made by the 1:8 Q-clip:pyrene mixture were identified by the 1D powder and 2D fiber WAXS characterizations. Time-resolved synchrotron X-ray characterization and thermal analysis further showed that removing the easily sublimed guest molecules (pyrene) via thermal annealing simply hollowed out the supramolecular structures without damaging the supramolecular scaffolds made by the Q-clips. Pyrene is thus a nanotemplating reagent that can be used to create the hollowed-out 2D lamellar and 1D cylindrical scaffolds of Q-clips. The study thus gave a novel example of a host–guest mixture that is able to carry out composition-driven structural modulation and guest-induced nanotemplates.
records.contribution: 第一作者，主導研究設計、合成、WAXS／同步輻射結構鑑定與論文撰寫。
records.significance: 首次示範主客體莫耳比可作為調變超分子結構的開關（1:4 層狀 ↔ 1:8 六方柱狀），且昇華移除客體即得中空奈米骨架——把主客體化學變成可用的奈米模板工法。

records.title: 進入馬里蘭大學（UMD）化學博士班，加入 Mercedes Taylor 實驗室
records.detail: 研究方向：自組裝驅動之稀土分離（M4L4 金屬有機籠、聚醯胺離子聚合物網絡）。入學年份為推估，待確認。

records.title: Connecting Molecular and Supramolecular Shapeshifting by the Ostwald's Nucleation Stages of a Star Giant Molecule
records.detail: 第二作者。八臂星形巨型分子 NPOSS 於不同 Ostwald 成核階段的分子／超分子雙層級變形。
records.venue: Journal of the American Chemical Society (JACS)
records.abstract: The shapeshifting behavior for synthetic matters was found at either the molecular or supramolecular level, but the connection between shapeshifting at the two hierarchical levels remains missing. In this study, an 8-arm star giant molecule, NPOSS, was synthesized to connect the molecular and supramolecular shapeshifting. Controlling the conditions of bulk self-assembly allowed us to bring NPOSS into three different Ostwald's stages of nucleation. The high conformational flexibility of NPOSS facilitates molecular shapeshifting and allows NPOSS to take the discotic, rod-like and star-like geometries in different Ostwald's stages. Simultaneous changes in the supramolecular scaffolds were observed as the discotic, rod-like and star-like NPOSS molecules self-assembled into the supramolecular scaffolds of 1D columns, 2D lamellae, and 3D networks, respectively. These changes in the hierarchical structures also affect the CO₂ affinity of NPOSS. Therefore, the connection between the molecular/supramolecular shapeshifting and the structure-driven property changes of NPOSS were established by taking advantage of the high conformational freedom of the 8-arm star giant molecule and its diverse self-assembly pathways leading to the different Ostwald's stages.
records.contribution: 第二作者，參與自組裝條件控制與階層結構鑑定（交大時期成果，發表於赴美後）。
records.significance: 把「分子變形」與「超分子變形」兩個層級首次串連：同一分子隨成核階段呈盤狀／棒狀／星狀，對應組裝成 1D 柱、2D 層、3D 網絡，且 CO₂ 親和性隨之改變——結構層級設計即可調控材料性質。

records.title: Carbonyl-rich porous organic polymers for cobalt adsorption from water
records.detail: 共同作者（第 4 作者）。羰基富集多孔有機聚合物之水中鈷吸附。
records.abstract: By controlling the ratio of end groups in a series of porous organic polymers, we maximized their cobalt adsorption capacity.
records.contribution: 共同作者，參與聚合物合成與吸附實驗（Taylor 實驗室團隊研究）。
records.significance: 以端基比例作為設計旋鈕最大化鈷吸附容量——鈷是電池關鍵金屬，從水中吸附回收兼具水處理與資源循環意義。

records.title: Structural Effects on Solubility and Crystallinity in Polyamide Ionomers
records.detail: 第一作者。聚醯胺離子聚合物的結構—溶解度—結晶性關係（跨 UMD／Sandia／UF／UPenn 合作）。
records.abstractSource: 出版社未公開摘要全文（可循 DOI 查閱）
records.contribution: 第一作者，主導離子聚合物合成與結構鑑定，整合 Sandia、Florida、Penn 三方合作的量測。
records.significance: 系統性建立聚醯胺離子聚合物「主鏈結構 → 溶解度／結晶性」的設計關係，是博士論文第二主軸（離子聚合物網絡）的基礎，也支撐後續稀土結合網絡材料的加工性設計。

records.title: Selective binding of rare-earth ions in polymerizable cages
records.detail: 第一作者（與指導教授 Mercedes Taylor 二人作）。稀土金屬與烯烴端基配體自組裝成籠，經 thiol-ene 聚合形成稀土結合高分子網絡。
records.authorNote: 第一作者（與指導教授二人作）
records.abstract: We assembled metal-organic cages by combining rare-earth metals with an alkene-terminated ligand (L), allowing for subsequent thiol-ene polymerization of the cages to yield rare-earth-binding polymer networks. Mixed-metal self-assembly experiments with ligand L show that the size ratio of the respective rare-earth metals dictates the metal composition of the cages.
records.contribution: 第一作者，獨立完成籠自組裝、thiol-ene 聚合與混合金屬選擇性實驗。
records.significance: 把「會選稀土的籠」變成「會選稀土的材料」：可聚合籠交聯後保留離子尺寸選擇性，混合金屬實驗證明尺寸比決定籠內金屬組成——為稀土分離材料化鋪路。

records.title: Self-Assembly Drives Rare-Earth Separations in a Family of M4L4 Cages
records.detail: 第一作者。ChemRxiv 預印本，博士論文核心成果：五種配體的稀土籠自組裝設計原則。
records.abstract: Rare-earth elements are indispensable to high-tech applications, making efficient rare-earth separations increasingly essential. An emerging approach to these challenging separations is the self-assembly of lanthanide-based supramolecular cages. In this study, we establish design principles for self-assembly-driven rare-earth separations by investigating five ligands with distinct substituents (L-Cbz, L-propyl, L-alkene, L-benzyl, L-NH2), two polymer networks based on these ligands, and a monotopic fragment of the tritopic ligand structure. The ligand L-Cbz shows a unique ability to separate lanthanides compared to the monotopic ligand and the polymer networks, underscoring the importance of cage self-assembly to separation performance. We found that L-Cbz forms M4L4 cages with middle-to-late rare-earth ions (Eu³⁺, Tb³⁺, Dy³⁺, Y³⁺, Ho³⁺, Lu³⁺) but a mixture of M2L2/M4L4 species with larger lanthanides (La³⁺, Pr³⁺, Nd³⁺, Sm³⁺), while L-propyl forms cages with all tested rare-earth ions, with minor La2L2. Single crystal X-ray diffraction shows that pure L-Cbz precipitates from La2(L-Cbz)2 solution, suggesting that M2L2 is an unstable intermediate. In contrast, L-alkene and L-benzyl display size-dependent thresholds for cage formation, beginning at Sm³⁺ and Pr³⁺, respectively. Our results suggest that ligand-arm flexibility modulates these thresholds, providing design rules for L-based lanthanide separations. Extended X-ray absorption fine structure (EXAFS) measurements, corroborated by DFT calculations, further reveal a correlation between M–N bond length and a ligand's propensity for cage formation. Collectively, these insights provide practical guidelines for designing ligands for self-assembly-based rare-earth separations.
records.contribution: 第一作者，博士論文核心章節：設計並比較五種配體，整合單晶繞射、EXAFS（與陽明交大洪崧富合作）與 DFT。
records.significance: 回答「什麼樣的配體才能用自組裝分離稀土」：證明籠自組裝本身（而非配體片段或聚合網絡）是分離能力的來源，並給出配體臂柔性 → 成籠尺寸閾值的設計規則——這是稀土分離從個案走向可設計的關鍵一步。

records.title: 博士論文口試：Self-Assembly Drives Rare Earth Separation: M4L4 Cages and Polyamide Ionomer Networks
records.detail: 指導教授 Mercedes Taylor。地點：UMD Chemistry Great Hall。

records.title: 赴日本擔任博士後研究員
records.detail: 機構與實驗室名稱待補充（公開資料尚查無）。
